title: RFI 7326 - slaughtered male calves aged 0 or 1 month
body: "Request made under the Environmental Information Regulations 2004 (EIR) for the number of calves aged 0 month or 1 month slaughtered in slaughterhouse and on farm during the years 2022, 2023 and 2024. Request for the number of male calves killed in slaughterhouses with an age at death at up to, but not including, eight months during the years 2022, 2023 and 2024. "
